ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the contact belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the contact was added */,
  "date_last_modified" TEXT /* Date the contact was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contact (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the contact */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the organization */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the organization */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the organization */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the organization was added */,
  "date_last_modified" TEXT /* Date the organization was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the organization belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES organization_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the user was added */,
  "date_last_modified" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being changed */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_changes_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization being changed */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., phone, address) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_changes_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
